subject: vocabulary
title: Prepositions
instruction:
Complete the sentences with the correct prepositions from the box.

Prepositions: about | for | in | on | to | with | of
passage:
The president refused to comment [1] the problem.
I found out about the hotel [2] the Internet.
I would like to apply [3] the position of head chef.
The students were allowed [4] participate [5] the basketball tournament.
I was completely satisfied [6] the service at your hotel.
My mother is concerned [7] the amount [8] money I spend each week.
The cost [9] living has increased by 5 per cent this year.
There are several reasons [10] this increase.
